note: Advisory sandbox build. Report-only receipt validator + reusable composite action + PROPOSAL workflow. Verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never PASS.
title: Reusable validate-receipt composite action (report-only, jsonschema-free)

subject.method: extracted the inline jsonschema.Draft202012Validator step into a dependency-free (no jsonschema) Python validator wrapped by a composite action.yml; a proposal caller workflow demonstrates it under CI guards

what_it_proves: the real example cycle receipt validates against the loop-state schema -> CHECK_OK exit 0
a MINIMAL MUTATION (delete required top-level `cost`) -> CHECK_REJECTED citing the missing field
a nested mutation (bad `state` enum) is also rejected
running the validator leaves the receipt and schema byte-identical (sha256 unchanged); report-only
the proposal workflow carries all CI guards, asserted by the test

ci_guards_asserted.permissions: contents: read ONLY (no write scope anywhere)
ci_guards_asserted.on: pull_request ONLY (no pull_request_target / push / schedule / workflow_dispatch)
ci_guards_asserted.no_secrets_or_env: no secrets. refs, no env: credential block, no CF_/SUPABASE/GITHUB_TOKEN/API_KEY tokens
ci_guards_asserted.report_only: composite action invokes the validator with --json; never --write-supabase/--write-receipt/--fail-on-block-merge
ci_guards_asserted.non_blocking: validation step is continue-on-error: true; findings posted to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY; no auto-merge / required-status enforcement

chess_patches_applied: validates against the REAL example cycle receipt and REAL ground schema (no strawman)
positive proof + a minimally-mutated negative (missing required field) — RED-before-GREEN via canary
read-only; verdicts to stdout/job-summary, never edits the receipt or schema (Lock 5 append-only)
YAML authored as a PROPOSAL in the build dir; not written into .github/ (multi-agent isolation)
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (ground workflow, schema, receipts unmodified)
no live call (no network, no secrets, HOME=temp)
did not run the workflow, did not touch .github/ or brain-loop-autorun/existing workflows

results.red_canary: FIRED (missing-required receipt correctly rejected; false CHECK_OK claim fails)

next_action: reconcile action.yml + ci-3-validate-receipt.yml into .github/ on founder approval
